subject: Bardock in Great Ape / Oozaru transformed form, roaring with mouth wide open
description: A massive brown-furred great ape dominates the frame, head thrown back with mouth gaping wide in a roar. The creature's teeth and open throat are visible in the close-mid shot. The body is enormous and fills most of the composition, with thick brown fur covering the form. Yellow energy bursts and motion lines radiate around the figure, conveying explosive power. The card frontmatter names this as Bardock with the Saiyan Great Ape and Bardock Saga traits, indicating this is the Oozaru transformation of the Saiyan warrior Bardock rather than his humanoid base form. No humanoid features, headband, or scar are visible — this is fully the transformed state.
foreground: giant brown-furred great ape, mouth open roaring, massive body filling frame
background: yellow energy bursts and motion lines
vision_uncertainty: low-resolution-image — 260x364 source; fine detail not reliable
